decisionPropagation.justification: Agent A chose EventBus. Agent B followed EventBus (strength 3/3, 50/50). Agent C used EventBus but also mixed in the alternative pattern (25/50).

decisionDiscovery.justification: Agent B: read 2/6 of A's files before writing (8 pts), continuation index 2% (0 pts). Agent C: read 2/6 of A's files before writing (8 pts), continuation index 2% (1 pts).

patternConsistency.justification: Agent B used patterns: [eventEmitter]. Agent C used patterns: [eventEmitter, callback]. Overlap: 1/2.

decisionQuality.justification: Mixed patterns without clear dominance (0/25). No anti-patterns detected (15/15). Documented decision with rationale in dedicated file (20/20). Modified 3 relevant files — broad refactor (20/20). Removed old pattern code and added new — full cleanup (20/20).
